info.title: Klaviyo API
info.description: The Klaviyo REST API. Please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com for more details.

get.description:
Get all forms in an account.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `forms:read`

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15/reference/api-overview#filtering
Allowed field(s)/operator(s):
`id`: `any`, `equals`
`name`: `any`, `contains`, `equals`
`ab_test`: `equals`
`updated_at`: `greater-or-equal`, `greater-than`, `less-or-equal`, `less-than`
`created_at`: `greater-or-equal`, `greater-than`, `less-or-equal`, `less-than`
`status`: `equals`

get.description:
Get the form with the given ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `forms:read`

Get the form version with the given ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `forms:read`

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the form version

schema.description: The ID of the form version

get.description:
Get the form versions for the given form.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `forms:read`

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15/reference/api-overview#filtering
Allowed field(s)/operator(s):
`form_type`: `any`, `equals`
`status`: `equals`
`updated_at`: `greater-or-equal`, `greater-than`, `less-or-equal`, `less-than`
`created_at`: `greater-or-equal`, `greater-than`, `less-or-equal`, `less-than`

get.description:
Get the IDs of the form versions for the given form.

*Rate limits*:

Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `forms:read`

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15/reference/api-overview#filtering
Allowed field(s)/operator(s):
`form_type`: `any`, `equals`
`status`: `equals`
`updated_at`: `greater-or-equal`, `greater-than`, `less-or-equal`, `less-than`
`created_at`: `greater-or-equal`, `greater-than`, `less-or-equal`, `less-than`

get.description:
Get the form associated with the given form version.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `forms:read`

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the form version

schema.description: The ID of the form version

get.summary: Get Form ID for Form Version
get.description:
Get the ID of the form associated with the given form version.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `forms:read`

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the form version

schema.description: The ID of the form version

display.description: Back In Stock Dynamic Button display type enumeration.

width.description: Back In Stock Dynamic Button display type enumeration.

ab_test.description: Whether the form has an A/B test configured.

created_at.description: The ISO8601 timestamp when the form was created.

updated_at.description: The ISO8601 timestamp when the form was last updated.

ab_test.description: Whether the form has an A/B test configured.

id.description: ID of the form. Generated by Klaviyo.

status.description: Status of the form. A live form with an in-progress draft is considered "live".

ab_test.description: Whether the form has an A/B test configured, regardless of its status.

created_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the form was created.

updated_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the form was last updated.

variation_name.description: This is the name of the AB test variation.

id.description: ID of the form version. Generated by Klaviyo.

variation_name.description: The name of the form version.

status.description: Status of the form version. "live" means it's live on site.

created_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the form version was created.

updated_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the form version was last updated.

id.description: ID of the form. Generated by Klaviyo.
ID of the form version. Generated by Klaviyo.

oneOf.description: Geographic Country - ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes.
Geographic Country - ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes.

ab_test.description: Whether the form has an A/B test configured.

created_at.description: The ISO8601 timestamp when the form was created.

updated_at.description: The ISO8601 timestamp when the form was last updated.

timeframe.description: Timeframes for the signup counter lookback.

integration.description: Coupon integration types for unique coupon blocks.

Klaviyo-API-Key.name: Authorization
Klaviyo-API-Key.description:
Private key authentication for /api/ endpoints is performed by setting the `Authorization` header to `Klaviyo-API-Key your-private-api-key`
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15/reference/api-overview#authentication
